name: Ironhold Quarry
identity: Major Roazian extraction site linked to law, labor, and strategic infrastructure.
approach: Severe extraction landscape with visible labor discipline and transport controls.
inside: Ore flows, guarded labor, and infrastructure support make the quarry a blunt expression of Roazian order.
expected_behavior: obey labor zones and guard instructions
faith: Low-ornament discipline and civic necessity dominate.

sensory_surface.detail: Severe extraction landscape with visible labor discipline and transport controls.
Ore flows, guarded labor, and infrastructure support make the quarry a blunt expression of Roazian order.

social_expectation_surface.detail: obey labor zones and guard instructions

public_behavior_texture: People who belong here are usually miners, guards, prison laborers, and public conduct is read through expectations such as obey labor zones and guard instructions.
visible_power_signals: Ordinary decisions are visibly shaped by ORE, Iron Accord.
local_tension_surface: The place feels stable only until pressures such as labor harshness, resource theft, border competition begin showing through daily routines.
differentiator: Ironhold Quarry stands apart because its economy leans on ore, stone; public faith remains visible through Low-ornament discipline and civic necessity dominate.; outsiders are noticed fastest when they resemble saboteurs, smugglers.
encounter_rhythm: Most first scenes in Ironhold Quarry begin through industrial site rhythms: arrival, observation, minor correction, and only then deeper access.
